name: Rocuronium
executiveSummary: Rapid induction for polytrauma patients without prior fasting.
indications:
## Main indications

Rapid induction for polytrauma patients without prior fasting.

> Adjust according to institutional protocol and medical prescription.

pediatrico.finalConcentration: 0,5 to 1 mg/mL. May be administered undiluted.
pediatrico.infusionRate: Push or infusion with infusion pump.
pediatrico.compatibility: Incompatible with thiopental, amphotericin, amoxicillin, dexamethasone, diazepam, furosemide, insulin, methylprednisolone, vancomycin.
pediatrico.notes: SPECIALIST USE ONLY. May be administered undiluted. For continuous infusion dilute with normal saline or 5% dextrose at a concentration of 0,5 to 1 mg/mL; do not mix with alkaline solutions.

stability:
## General

- Opened vial per package insert.

## Pediatric guide

- 30 days refrigerated once opened.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

Apnea, vagolytic effects, transient hypotension, hypertension, dose-related tachycardia-apnea, arrhythmias, injection-site edema, hiccups, pruritus, nausea, wheezing, residual muscle weakness.
